title: See / Filter Checklist Items Not Checked in Updates Section of a Board
excerpt: I would love to see ability to click the checklist completion green circle on an item of a board and then it open the updates section but filtered to only the updates that have a  check list items that are not yet checke…

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to see ability to click the checklist completion green circle on an item of a board and then it open the updates section but filtered to only the updates that have a check list items that are not yet checked off. I have 3 on this item on my board for example and i cannot find it in the hundreds of updates in this item.

Screenshot 2024-07-31 at 7.48.15 AM1408×334 34.4 KB
